title: Lansono

{{Quote|'Palpatine has never been behind the Military Creation Act, and was ready to stall it when the leader of the opposition appeared to be dead,' said Senator Candabrine Bu (Lansono).|[[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] report|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Lansono''' was a celestial body<ref name="HNN" /> located in the [[Lansono system/Legends|Lansono system]], a part of the [[Southern Core]] portion of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEA Lansono" /> By the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] [[22 BBY/Legends|13:5:16]], [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Candabrine Bu]] represented Lansono in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]]. Bu supported the passing of the [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]]<ref name="HNN" /> that proposed the restoration of a centralized [[Republic Military/Legends|Republic military]], which had been dissolved as part of [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY's]] [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]] event.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Lansono was introduced in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 56|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #56'']], an [[in-universe]] issue of the HoloNet News<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]] on [[May 16]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN56 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6873383|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=ForceAlly|date=2002-05-16|time=5:34 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20220611192029/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-15}}</ref> [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' misspelled the celestial body's name as "Lansano."<ref name="CSWE Bu">{{CSWECite|I|96|Bu, Candabrine}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Lansono [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square L-12.<ref name="TEA Lansono" />
